message:
test(demo): add Theme Studio snapshot tests (bd-vu0o.1)

Adds comprehensive snapshot coverage for the Theme Studio screen:
- Initial state at 80x24, 120x40, 40x10 (tiny), and 200x50 (wide)
- Token navigation (Tab + arrow keys)
- Vim-style navigation (j/k)
- Zero-area edge case
- Title/tab_label verification

The snapshots capture the two-panel layout with:
- Preset list (5 themes)
- Token inspector with color swatches and WCAG contrast ratings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
